pageDescription: Plan your retirement savings and calculate required contributions to meet your retirement goals with inflation and investment return projections

replacementRate.title: Income Replacement Rate
replacementRate.description: Most financial planners recommend replacing 70-90% of pre-retirement income

socialSecurity.title: Social Security Benefits
socialSecurity.description: Social Security typically replaces about 40% of pre-retirement income for average earners

savingsRate.title: Savings Rate Guidelines
savingsRate.description: Financial experts recommend saving 10-15% of income for retirement

criticalWarningsList.notDiagnostic: This calculator provides retirement planning estimates only
criticalWarningsList.actual: Actual retirement needs may vary based on lifestyle, health, and market conditions

importantNotesList: Start saving early to take advantage of compound interest
Consider healthcare costs, which typically increase with age
Plan for longer lifespans, potentially 20-30 years in retirement
Regularly review and adjust your retirement plan as circumstances change

messages.enterInformation: Enter your retirement planning information to calculate savings needs
messages.resultMessage: Your retirement calculation results are shown below

disclaimer.title: Important Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This calculator provides retirement planning estimates based on mathematical projections. Actual retirement needs may vary significantly based on lifestyle choices, healthcare costs, market conditions, and other factors not included in these calculations.

seekHelp.title: Financial Resources
seekHelp.content: For personalized retirement planning and investment advice, consult financial advisors or retirement planning specialists with expertise in long-term financial planning and individual circumstances.
